title: Complete a Jakarta EE namespace migration
prompt: The Orders web component is targeted at Jakarta EE 10, but its production sources and deployment metadata still use legacy Java EE javax namespaces. Complete the namespace migration across the servlet and filter code, Bean Validation constraints and configuration, Jakarta Persistence code and mappings, and the descriptors that are packaged into the WAR. Target Servlet 6.0, Jakarta Validation 3.0, and Jakarta Persistence 3.1. Preserve all existing component behavior: annotations and their values, filter dispatcher mappings, servlet mappings, validation settings, persistence-unit settings, entity/table/column mappings, class names, and descriptor package locations. Update renamed standard persistence property keys where required. Do not change the tests or introduce dependencies; the test command must remain offline.
